briefdescription.para: Generic string getter with optional default and return code.
Generic integer getter with optional default and return code.
Generic logical getter with optional default and return code.
Generic string setter with return code.
Generic integer setter with return code.
Generic logical setter with return code.
Generic double precision real array getter.
Get all keys from a YAML map.
Safe YAML real number reader Reads value as string first, then converts to avoid yaml-cpp conversion errors.
Safe YAML integer reader Reads value as string first, then converts to avoid yaml-cpp conversion errors.
Safe YAML logical reader Reads value as string first, then converts to avoid yaml-cpp conversion errors.
